platform_residuals: The canonical source is Markdown; the compatibility draft retained heading text but not Markdown heading or emphasis semantics after plain-text import.
The live Article header editor exposed crop and remove controls but no image-description field, so platform header alt-text entry and readback could not be performed.
Audience controls were not inspected because doing so requires opening the publication flow; publication was not authorized.
The observed composer behavior is dated and may change.
non_claims: This derivative is not canonical claim, source, proof, experiment, or release authority.
An unpublished X draft is not a public Article, deployment, endorsement, or license grant.
Composer acceptance and image preview do not prove article accuracy or book claims.
